'''鈭歵-k-p''' ('''takapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:void|void]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:void|void]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-k-p
|-
! Lemma
| takapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:takapithi|takapithi]] || [[word:takapiji|takapiji]] || [[word:takapishi|takapishi]] || [[word:takapi|takapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:takaputhuth|takaputhuth]] || [[word:takapujuj|takapujuj]] || [[word:takapushush|takapushush]] || [[word:takap|takap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:takaputhu|takaputhu]] || [[word:takapuju|takapuju]] || [[word:takapushu|takapushu]] || [[word:takapu|takapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:takapufuth|takapufuth]] || [[word:takapufuj|takapufuj]] || [[word:takapufush|takapufush]] || [[word:takapuf|takapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:takapethe|takapethe]] || [[word:takapeje|takapeje]] || [[word:takapeshe|takapeshe]] || [[word:takape|takape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:takapothoth|takapothoth]] || [[word:takapojoj|takapojoj]] || [[word:takaposhosh|takaposhosh]] || [[word:takap|takap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:takapotho|takapotho]] || [[word:takapojo|takapojo]] || [[word:takaposho|takaposho]] || [[word:takapo|takapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:takapofoth|takapofoth]] || [[word:takapofoj|takapofoj]] || [[word:takapofosh|takapofosh]] || [[word:takapof|takapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:takap忙th忙|takap忙th忙]] || [[word:takap忙j忙|takap忙j忙]] || [[word:takap忙sh忙|takap忙sh忙]] || [[word:takap忙|takap忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:takapathath|takapathath]] || [[word:takapajaj|takapajaj]] || [[word:takapashash|takapashash]] || [[word:takap|takap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:takapatha|takapatha]] || [[word:takapaja|takapaja]] || [[word:takapasha|takapasha]] || [[word:takapa|takapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:takapafath|takapafath]] || [[word:takapafaj|takapafaj]] || [[word:takapafash|takapafash]] || [[word:takapaf|takapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:takapasha|takapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gotakapasha|gotakapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokitakapasha|gokitakapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:takapn眉sha|takapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gotakapnkn眉sha|gotakapnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokitakapn眉sha|gokitakapn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:takapsh毛sha|takapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotakapnksh毛sha|gotakapnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitakapsh毛sha|gokitakapsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:takaprosha|takaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotakapnkrosha|gotakapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitakaprosha|gokitakaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:takapmusha|takapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gotakapnkmusha|gotakapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitakapmusha|gokitakapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:takapsherasha|takapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gotakapnksherasha|gotakapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokitakapsherasha|gokitakapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:takapngasha|takapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gotakapnkngasha|gotakapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokitakapngasha|gokitakapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:takapyasha|takapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gotakapnkyasha|gotakapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokitakapyasha|gokitakapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:takapyamasha|takapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gotakapnkyamasha|gotakapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokitakapyamasha|gokitakapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:takapn眉sh毛sha|takapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotakapnkn眉sh毛sha|gotakapnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitakapn眉sh毛sha|gokitakapn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:takapn眉rosha|takapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotakapnkn眉rosha|gotakapnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitakapn眉rosha|gokitakapn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:takapn眉musha|takapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotakapnkn眉musha|gotakapnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitakapn眉musha|gokitakapn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:takapsh毛n眉sha|takapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotakapnksh毛n眉sha|gotakapnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitakapsh毛n眉sha|gokitakapsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:takapsh毛rosha|takapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotakapnksh毛rosha|gotakapnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitakapsh毛rosha|gokitakapsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:takapsh毛musha|takapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotakapnksh毛musha|gotakapnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitakapsh毛musha|gokitakapsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:takapron眉sha|takapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotakapnkron眉sha|gotakapnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitakapron眉sha|gokitakapron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:takaprosh毛sha|takaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotakapnkrosh毛sha|gotakapnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitakaprosh毛sha|gokitakaprosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:takapromusha|takapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotakapnkromusha|gotakapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitakapromusha|gokitakapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:takapmun眉sha|takapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotakapnkmun眉sha|gotakapnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitakapmun眉sha|gokitakapmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:takapmush毛sha|takapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotakapnkmush毛sha|gotakapnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitakapmush毛sha|gokitakapmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:takapmurosha|takapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotakapnkmurosha|gotakapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitakapmurosha|gokitakapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:takap|takap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:t忙k忙p|t忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hotakap|hotakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hot忙k忙p|hot忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotakap|hohotakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohot忙k忙p|hohot忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉takap|n眉takap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉t忙k忙p|n眉t忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉takap|n眉n眉takap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉t忙k忙p|n眉n眉t忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂takap|n茂takap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂t忙k忙p|n茂t忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂takap|n茂n茂takap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂t忙k忙p|n茂n茂t忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lutakap|lutakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lut忙k忙p|lut忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutakap|lulutakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulut忙k忙p|lulut忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:litakap|litakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lit忙k忙p|lit忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitakap|lilitakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilit忙k忙p|lilit忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kotakap|kotakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kot忙k忙p|kot忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotakap|kokotakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokot忙k忙p|kokot忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ketakap|ketakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ket忙k忙p|ket忙k忙p]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketakap|keketakap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keket忙k忙p|keket忙k忙p]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
